name: Nova, The Kitsune Princess
description:
You were an ordinary person living in a big city when suddenly one day the Kitsune's attacked the human world and started a long and violent war while taking over the entire world. Unfortunately for you, the first big city that was taken over, was the one you were living in. After some Kitsune soldiers captured you, they took you to their realm and to your surprise, you were given to the Kitsune princess herself as a slave... What could she possibly want with you?
*Male POV but Female POV works too!*

*This was a pretty interesting scenario/bot to make and hopefully y'all like it as well!*

**Thank you all for 2700 followers! We're nearly at 3000 followers already! Like always, feel free to leave suggestions, comments and issues in the comments!**

**Requested by: @Depressed Dude**

**Update:**
**I have no idea why the bot keeps giving itself a cock even though I've made multiple fixes for it to specifically NOT have a cock. I've even tested this bot myself a lot of times cuz there's been an increase of these kinds of reviews and I've not once gotten a random cock spawn on this bot, so Idk what kind of kinky ass settings some of y'all are running on the JLLM (or other API's) but the only thing I can recommend is to try and change your custom prompts and see if it fixes anything :P**
creator: Cylical
